notes: AKB-19 constraint: ONLY Liam (VCgLBmBjldJmfphyB8sZ) and Alice (Xb7hH8MSUJpSbSDYk0k2) used. No opening overlap — s01 ends at 6.53s, s02 starts at 6.80s (0.27s gap). Verified with silencedetect: gap at 6.13-6.88s, clean start at 0:00. s06/s07/s08 used shorter v2 renders to fit within visual windows.

steps.display_text: A Spinner Wheel picks any entry at random. Add names, topics, or prizes, then spin to reveal the winner.
steps.tts_text: A Spinner Wheel picks any entry at random. Add names, topics, or prizes, then spin to reveal the winner.

steps.display_text: Click New Presentation to start a fresh deck.
steps.tts_text: Click New Presentation to start a fresh deck.

steps.display_text: Select Spinner Wheel from the slide type picker in the Quiz section.
steps.tts_text: Select Spinner Wheel from the slide type picker in the Quiz section.

steps.display_text: Click the Entries field and type your entries — one per line. Or paste a whole list from your clipboard at once.
steps.tts_text: Click the Entries field and type your entries — one per line. Or paste a whole list from your clipboard at once.

steps.display_text: Click Save to add your entries to the wheel. Watch each name appear as a coloured segment.
steps.tts_text: Click Save to add your entries to the wheel. Watch each name appear as a coloured segment.

steps.display_text: Check Participant name autofill to let the wheel fill itself as people join.
steps.tts_text: Check Participant name autofill to let the wheel fill itself as people join.

steps.display_text: Spin time controls how long the wheel spins. Longer spins build more suspense.
steps.tts_text: Spin time controls how long the wheel spins. Longer spins build more suspense.

steps.display_text: Hit Present to go live, then press the centre of the wheel to spin. The winner is in!
steps.tts_text: Hit Present to go live, then press the centre of the wheel to spin. The winner is in!

mix_command: ffmpeg -y -i spinner-wheel-final.webm -i s01.mp3 -i s02.mp3 -i s03.mp3 -i s04.mp3 -i s05.mp3 -i s06_v2.mp3 -i s07_v2.mp3 -i s08_v2.mp3 -filter_complex '[1:a]adelay=0|0[a1];[2:a]adelay=6800|6800[a2];[3:a]adelay=11000|11000[a3];[4:a]adelay=15000|15000[a4];[5:a]adelay=23000|23000[a5];[6:a]adelay=27500|27500[a6];[7:a]adelay=33000|33000[a7];[8:a]adelay=38500|38500[a8];[a1][a2][a3][a4][a5][a6][a7][a8]amix=inputs=8:normalize=0[aout]' -map 0:v -map '[aout]' -c:v copy -c:a libopus -b:a 64k spinner-wheel-narrated.webm
